tweet.text:
Is tomorrow $TSLA Free Money Friday?

Either way locked in a bag on $TSLA today.

This week has been clean, $TSLA and $NVDA have been printing, also caught wins today on $DE and $MSFT, all paid well, didn’t touch $POET, but if you did, hope you’re up Big.

Free money Friday’s hit different until they don’t, take profits, don’t get greedy, the market can humble you fast.

If you’re green on the week, protect it, size down, be picky, not every setup deserves your money.

The best traders don’t chase, they wait, react, and execute, discipline pays more than hyper ever will.

profile_bio.description: Nurse 💉Dog cuddler by passion 🐾 Traveller by impulse ✈️ Trader fueled by caffeine, profits, and a little attitude.
